title: scanner: Zip212Enforcement::GracePeriod used for all heights including post-Canopy
description: scanner.rs:221 — SaplingIvkDecryptor always passes Zip212Enforcement::GracePeriod, accepting both pre and post-ZIP-212 encodings at all block heights. After Canopy activation (mainnet ~1,046,400; testnet ~1,028,500) only post-ZIP-212 notes are valid. GracePeriod is correct for historical scanning but means the scanner cannot detect if a post-Canopy block contains a malformed pre-ZIP-212 note. In practice the network rejects these, but the scanner silently accepts them. Fix: thread block_height and network into NoteDecryptor::try_decrypt_sapling; pass Zip212Enforcement::On for heights >= Canopy activation height.
